title: Surgeon Vacancy at Medtronic India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Medtronic India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Medtronic India Ventures Solutions in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Medtronic India Ventures Solutions:
Medtronic India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medtronic India Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
